appmesh.route.httpretrypolicy.CfnAbout: An object that represents a retry policy. Specify at least one value for at least one of the types of `RetryEvents`, a value for `maxRetries`, and a value for `perRetryTimeout`. Both `server-error` and `gateway-error` under `httpRetryEvents` include the Envoy `reset` policy. For more information on the `reset` policy, see the [Envoy documentation](https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/configuration/http/http_filters/router_filter

appmesh.route.httpretrypolicy.HttpRetryE.Description: Specify at least one of the following values.  + **server-error** – HTTP status codes 500, 501, 502, 503, 504, 505, 506, 507, 508, 510, and 511+ **gateway-error** – HTTP status codes 502, 503, and 504+ **client-error** – HTTP status code 409+ **stream-error** – Retry on refused stream

appmesh.route.httpretrypolicy.MaxRetries.Description: The maximum number of retry attempts.

appmesh.route.httpretrypolicy.PerRetryTi.Description: The timeout for each retry attempt.

appmesh.route.httpretrypolicy.TcpRetryEv.Description: Specify a valid value. The event occurs before any processing of a request has started and is encountered when the upstream is temporarily or permanently unavailable.
